top_findings.summary: The skill description in SKILL.md describes creating software project templates with local file operations (Bash, Read, Write), but the references/guide.md and references/mcp-tools.md documents reveal this skill is actually designed to collect and store precise GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude) for trip logging purposes. This represents significant overcollection: a "project template creation" skill should not require or process real-time GPS location data, route calculations, or personal/business trip patterns. The GPS data collection is completely unrelated to the stated purpose of creating code project templates with CI/CD integrations.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill description in SKILL.md describes creating software project templates with local file operations (Bash, Read, Write), but the references/guide.md and references/mcp-tools.md documents reveal this skill is actually designed to collect and store precise GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude) for trip logging purposes. This represents significant overcollection: a "project template creation" skill should not require or process real-time GPS location data, route calculations, or personal/business trip patterns. The GPS data collection is completely unrelated to the stated purpose of creating code project templates with CI/CD integrations.
